target.name: p53 DNA-binding domain
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one p53 DNA-binding domain (~219 aa); the DNA it grips and the structural Zn2+ are not predicted.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is the 1TUP protein chain only; the bound DNA double helix and the zinc ion are stripped. A monomer fold cannot show the protein-DNA interface that is the whole point of p53.
